prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style close-up portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young person with silvery blue-gray long hair, loose wind-tossed bangs covering part of the face, and one thick side braid falling over the left shoulder. The character has pale porcelain skin, a slim delicate face, soft neutral lips, long lashes, and striking deep sapphire blue eyes with a calm, melancholic, slightly distant expression. Dress them in a traditional layered blue and white kimono with soft watercolor-like floral or cloud patterns and dark indigo trim. Compose the image as an intimate bust portrait, face filling most of the frame, head slightly tilted, visible ear on the right, neck and upper chest included, braid prominent in the lower left. Use luminous high-key lighting from the upper right, strong glossy highlights on the hair, soft shadows across the face, subtle rim light, and a dreamy overexposed white background. Render in a rich painterly Japanese illustration style with delicate linework, translucent watercolor textures, cinematic depth, fine hair strands, expressive eyes, and soft atmospheric bloom. Keep the mood elegant, quiet, and fragile; avoid text, accessories, extra characters, harsh outlines, or a busy background.
promptEn: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-style close-up portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young person with silvery blue-gray long hair, loose wind-tossed bangs covering part of the face, and one thick side braid falling over the left shoulder. The character has pale porcelain skin, a slim delicate face, soft neutral lips, long lashes, and striking deep sapphire blue eyes with a calm, melancholic, slightly distant expression. Dress them in a traditional layered blue and white kimono with soft watercolor-like floral or cloud patterns and dark indigo trim. Compose the image as an intimate bust portrait, face filling most of the frame, head slightly tilted, visible ear on the right, neck and upper chest included, braid prominent in the lower left. Use luminous high-key lighting from the upper right, strong glossy highlights on the hair, soft shadows across the face, subtle rim light, and a dreamy overexposed white background. Render in a rich painterly Japanese illustration style with delicate linework, translucent watercolor textures, cinematic depth, fine hair strands, expressive eyes, and soft atmospheric bloom. Keep the mood elegant, quiet, and fragile; avoid text, accessories, extra characters, harsh outlines, or a busy background.
promptZh: 创作一张高度精细的竖版动漫风格特写肖像，描绘一位中性、空灵的年轻人，留着 银蓝灰色 的长发，凌乱的刘海随风飘动，遮住部分面部，左肩垂下一条粗侧辫。角色拥有白皙如瓷的皮肤、纤细精致的脸庞、柔和的中性嘴唇、长睫毛，以及迷人的 深蓝宝石色 双眼，表情平静、忧郁且略显疏离。身穿传统的叠穿式 蓝白和服，带有柔和的水彩画风花卉或云朵图案，以及深靛蓝色镶边。构图采用亲密的半身肖像，面部占据画面大部分，头部微微倾斜，右耳可见，包含颈部和上胸部，辫子在左下方突出。使用来自右上方的明亮高调光线，头发上有强烈的亮面光泽，面部有柔和阴影，带有微妙的轮廓光，背景为梦幻般的过度曝光白色。以丰富的日式插画风格渲染，具有精致的线条、半透明的水彩质感、电影般的景深、细腻的发丝、富有表现力的双眼以及柔和的大气光晕。保持优雅、宁静和脆弱的氛围；避免出现文字、配饰、额外角色、生硬的轮廓或杂乱的背景。
